personalInfo.name: Pooja Tiwari
personalInfo.bio: AI Solutions Architect & Full-Stack Developer crafting intelligent, scalable products at the intersection of machine learning and modern web engineering.

about.heading: About Me
about.description: I'm Pooja Tiwari, an AI Solutions Architect and Full-Stack Developer based between Melbourne and Jhapa. I design and ship end-to-end intelligent systems — from data pipelines and model serving to polished, responsive frontends. I care about clean architecture, measurable impact, and delightful user experiences.

experience.description: Lead the design of production ML systems and full-stack platforms serving thousands of users.
Built scalable web applications and internal tooling using React, Next.js and Python.

projects.title: NeuralOps Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time ML observability dashboard with model drift detection and alerting.

projects.title: Sentinel Chat
projects.description: Conversational AI assistant with RAG pipeline and streaming responses.
